meta.privacy: No student names or individual marks included.

units.title: Programming Foundations
units.intent: Introduce sequence, inputs, variables and basic program design.
units.notes: Reusable foundation unit for KS3 programming.

units.title: Data Representation
units.intent: Develop understanding of binary, hexadecimal, images, sound and compression.

units.title: Sphero Programming
units.intent: Apply sequence, selection and iteration through physical computing.
units.notes: Useful for engagement and practical evidence.

lessons.title: Sequence and Instructions
objectives: Understand that programs follow ordered instructions.
misconceptions: Students may think computers can infer missing steps.

lessons.title: Inputs and Variables
objectives: Use input and variables in a simple program.
misconceptions: Students may confuse variable names with text strings.

lessons.title: Binary Place Values
objectives: Convert binary integers using place values.
misconceptions: Students may read binary digits as normal denary numbers.

lessons.title: Binary Fractions in Python
objectives: Convert fractional denary values into binary using repeated multiplication.
misconceptions: Students may mix repeated division and repeated multiplication.

resources.title: Binary Fractions Lesson Plan
resources.notes: Add final PDF link when uploaded.
